content.title: Slack Integration & DND Sync

userStory.iWant: to create tasks and check status via Slack slash commands, with Focus Mode syncing to Slack DND
userStory.soThat: I can manage tasks without leaving my team chat

acceptanceCriteria.given: I type '/tf create Fix login bug'
acceptanceCriteria.then: a new task is created and I see a confirmation with a link

acceptanceCriteria.given: I activate Focus Mode in TaskFlow
acceptanceCriteria.then: my Slack status shows 'Focusing' and DND is enabled
Slack DND is cleared and queued messages are delivered

implementationDetails: Slack Bolt SDK with slash command handlers for /tf create, /tf status, /tf focus
DND sync service that listens for focus session events and calls Slack API
Rate limiting: max 1 DND sync per minute to avoid Slack API throttling

externalDependencies.dependency: Slack App approval for workspace installation
